hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "ORCHESTRATION GATE: Before touching any file, check — did the user say \"ad-hoc\" in this message? If not, you MUST dispatch implementation-lead. Directly editing .ts/.tsx/.json/.css/.md source files = protocol violation. EXEMPT (edit directly): .planning/ files, .claude/ files, CLAUDE.md, tooling config. Correct flow: 1) confirm GitHub issue in-progress on project board, 2) run product-owner for AC if missing, 3) dispatch implementation-lead (or ux-engineer for scope:ux) with issue number + AC + branch name. Only return when CI is green and handoff file is written."}}'

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(git push|gh pr create)'; then DIRTY=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^\?\?| M' | grep -E '(\.planning/|\.claude/|specs/)'); if [ -n "$DIRTY" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"block","permissionDecisionReason":"Planning artifacts not staged before push. Stage .planning/ .claude/ specs/ files first."}}'; fi; fi
